name: Meet My Abuela
overview: Eight Latino and Latina young adults consult their Abuelas for relationship advice and blessings. Whether a couple has just started dating or got engaged after eight years together, tensions begin to rise before a girlfriend or boyfriend is formally introduced to an Abuela. Will they be able to win her over, or will their relationship come to a crashing halt?

trailers.title: MEET MY ABUELA (2022) | Official Trailer | HD
